title: erigeron calcicola
intro: Erigeron calcicola, also known as the California fleabane or coast daisy, is a perennial wildflower native to the coastal areas of the Pacific coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Erigeron calcicola include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial protection against various diseases. Erigeron calcicola is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile and useful addition to natural health remedies.
